creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Andree from comment #12)
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280396#c6 are ones that need a second look.

If we decide on using USE_C*STD we should probably implement a check for not defining conflicting varaibles and also possibly some scan of CMake files.
